'''Ding''' was the [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] of [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo]]. He oversaw the protection of [[Anachro]], Gorga's wife.

{{Char-stub}}
